note: customs (37 nodes total) is a category free of the known duplicate-slug collisions in foods (sweetsleep/peach/porridge/sourleaf each exist as two separate node files under two categories — see the spawned data-hygiene follow-up task); a small, collision-free category makes an exact full-list pin cheap to maintain. Python (list_nodes.py, reads graph/nodes/customs/*.node.md live) and TS (list.ts, reads the bundle's nodes.json category field) agree exactly. Updated S193: the quote-minting slice added curated quotes to bedding, cupbearer, and harvest-feast (2 -> 5 has-quotes customs).
a category typo/unknown name is a query mistake, not a system fault — mirrors container()'s 'no matches' convention rather than raising.
